items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 再次声明因美国政府出口管制指令，全面暂停 Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 的 API 访问，相对此前的公告无新增技术细节。影响范围明确：所有调用方必须立即停用这两个模型名，否则会收到 403/区域受限错误，需在限流逻辑中按 model 字段做兜底降级。
items.backend_focus: 立即执行：把所有调用 fable-5 / mythos-5 的客户端代码切回旧档（如 claude-opus-4.x）；网关层按 model 名做禁用与告警，关注官方是否给出 reactivation 时间表与受影响 region 列表。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.8，定位 Opus 系列升级，重点强化 coding、agentic 任务与专业工作表现，并伴随一定的安全/一致性策略调整。相对此前 Opus 4.x 主要提升 agentic 与 coding 场景能力上限，摘要未给出 context window、max_tokens、tool use 协议、pricing 与 region 等具体差异参数。旧版 Opus 4.x 仍可用，迁移与 deprecation 时间未公布。
items.backend_focus: 预评测并关注字段：把 model 字段切到 claude-opus-4-8 跑内部 coding/agent benchmark；优先确认 context window、max_tokens、tool use schema、pricing tier 与可用 region，再决定是否在生产替换 Opus 4.x。

items.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 在首尔开设办公室并宣布与韩国 AI 生态多项合作，意味着 Claude 在韩国的区域可用性、本地化合规与数据驻留支持有望增强。这是区域扩张与商业合作公告，未明确具体模型版本、API endpoint、pricing 调整或 region 列表变化。对一般开发者影响取决于后续 region 上线节奏。
items.backend_focus: 关注 region 列表：监控 Anthropic 控制台新增 kr 区域端点与对应 pricing；如有韩国用户低延迟/数据驻留需求，可在 SDK base URL 配置中预留 region 切换开关。
